user.title: Connect to your DD-WRT router
user.description: Enter your router's connection details. The default username is **root**.

trackers.title: Device Tracker Options
trackers.description: Choose which device tracker families to enable. You can change these later under the integration's Configure option.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect — check the IP address, port, and credentials.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — check your username and password.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs.

init.title: DD-WRT Tracker Options
init.description: Choose which device tracker families to enable. Changes take effect on the next poll.
